etymology.description: 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + ⺼(⺼) (ròu, "meat") = depiction of a dog eating meat -> derived to mean 'satisfied', with modern form involving transformations of components
etymology.interpretation: The character depicts a dog consuming meat, representing the animal's satisfaction. The original components evolved over time into their modern forms, with 口 transitioning through 甘 and 日.
